name: maine-court-forms
description: Route a plain-language fact pattern to the correct Maine Judicial Branch court form and produce a filled PDF by mapping each form's AcroForm fields to a canonical fact object.

interface.shortDescription: Route + fill Maine Judicial Branch court forms
interface.longDescription: Go from a plain-language situation to the right Maine court form and a filled PDF. A single-call router selects the form(s) from a compact catalog; each form ships an AcroForm field schema and a canonical fact->field mapping, so the fill path is deterministic and needs no VLM at fill time. Blank PDFs are fetched on demand from the official portal and verified by SHA-256 — never redistributed. Bundles an MCP server (find_forms / get_form / fill_form) and a routing-and-fill skill. Not legal advice.
defaultPrompt: Use this project to assist with: I need the right Maine court form for my situation, filled out
